usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural adversarial test -- no travel use case evaluated. All 10 edge case tests passed. The API demonstrates robust input validation via buf.validate constraints (tests 2-4, 6-7, 9), correct error categorization distinguishing INVALID_ARGUMENT from NOT_FOUND (tests 1-2), proper state machine enforcement rejecting invalid status transitions with failed_precondition (test 5), idempotent delete behavior returning empty response for non-existent resources (test 8), and correct handling of empty collections returning success with empty results rather than errors (test 10).

test_results.notes: Correct error category -- valid UUID format but resource does not exist

test_results.expected: INVALID_ARGUMENT error from buf.validate UUID constraint
test_results.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: id: value must be a valid UUID
test_results.notes: Validation interceptor correctly catches malformed UUID before business logic

test_results.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: title: value length must be at least 1 characters

test_results.expected: INVALID_ARGUMENT error from buf.validate string length constraint
test_results.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: title: value length must be at most 512 characters

test_results.description: Invalid status transition: COMPLETED to PLANNING
test_results.actual: failed_precondition: invalid trip status transition: completed -> planning
test_results.notes: State machine enforcement is intentional. PLANNING->COMPLETED succeeded, COMPLETED->PLANNING rejected with failed_precondition. This is correct behavior -- the backend enforces a directed state machine.

test_results.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: content: value length must be at least 1 characters
test_results.notes: buf.validate min_len constraint prevents empty AI invocations

test_results.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: content: value length must be at most 10000 characters

test_results.notes: Idempotent delete -- no error for non-existent resource. Both NOT_FOUND and silent success are acceptable per test spec.

test_results.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: raw_text: value length must be at least 1 characters
test_results.notes: buf.validate min_len constraint prevents empty booking ingestion

test_results.expected: Successful response with empty trips array (not an error)
test_results.actual: Successful response: {"pagination":{}} -- empty result set with pagination metadata, no error
test_results.notes: Correctly returns success with empty collection rather than NOT_FOUND error
